subject: Galarian Mr. Mime, a humanoid Pokemon in a pale outfit with an ice-blue body performing an ice-skating pose on a frozen surface
description: A humanoid figure with a pale, roundish head and ice-blue body strikes a dynamic skating pose on a gleaming frozen surface. Shards of ice and a crystalline backdrop suggest a frozen tundra or glacier environment. The figure's arms are outstretched as if in motion, evoking a performance or dance. The overall palette is cold white and icy blue with pale lavender tones. The card background includes swirling ice-crystal effects.
foreground: humanoid ice-skating figure on frozen ground
background: frozen tundra, ice shards, crystalline effects
